name: Rahm-Fleckle (Sweet or Sour Cream Dumplings)
recipeIngredient: 5 Potatoes, boiled in their jackets and then grated
1/8 l Cream or sour cream (1/2 cup plus 1/2 tbsp)
A few tart apples, peeled and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the grated potatoes, flour, egg, and salt, and knead into a dough.
2. Roll out to 1/5 of an inch thickness, and place in a greased pan.
3. Spread the cream or sour cream over the top, then cover with the sliced apples.
4. Bake at medium heat.
5. Cut into squares and serve hot, covered with cream.
Serves 4.
